arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have confirmed reports that Sven Mislintat is leaving his position as technical director.

arts.ttl: A Tactical Breakdown: What Borussia Dortmund Should Expect from Niko Kovac
arts.sum: When the opposition wins possession in their defensive third and begins playing the ball out from the back, Kovac instructs his attacking contingent to man-mark several of the opposing players but leave one full-back open. Kovac’s willingness to force quick transitions and play direct is something he utilized at Frankfurt, Wolfsburg, and Monaco when he found his team was at a talent disadvantage.

arts.ttl: How will Borussia Dortmund line up under Niko Kovač?
arts.sum: Serhou Guirassy has performed well since his summer transfer from VfB Stuttgart, scoring nine goals from 17 Bundesliga games at the point of the attack, while Felix Nmecha's emergence in central midfield, playing his way into the Germany squad, has been eminently impressive. For the most part, Şahin tried to play with a 4-2-3-1 formation - one which has certain hallmarks of Kovač's preferred system: a settled back four, a lone striker with nearby support, and a degree of agnosticism as how the team lines up in between.

arts.ttl: Official | Sven Mislintat sacked by Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have announced that today Sven Mislintat has been sacked by the club and left with immediate effect. Mislintat was technical director and squad planner for Dortmund having returned…

arts.ttl: Mislintat gone: Former Ajax technical director sacked by Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Technical director Sven Mislintat has been fired at Borussia Dortmund. The club announced this on Thursday via official channels.

arts.ttl: VfB Stuttgart looking for a number six midfielder to challenge Atakan Karazor and Angelo Stiller in the summer
arts.sum: Bild reports that VfB Stuttgart are looking to boost their options in midfield in the summer and sign a ‘number six’ who can challenge the current midfield duo. Stuttgart are willing…
